message:
fix(freeze): Fix is_trampoline codegen for non-trampoline functions

Fixed all frozen function C code generation issues that were causing
CI build failures with invalid C code (break statements outside loops).

Changes:
- Fixed return_undef opcode to use compile-time branching (break for
  trampoline, return for non-trampoline)
- Fixed all local variable opcodes (get_loc*, put_loc*, set_loc*) to
  use correct reference:
  - Trampoline functions: frame->locals[n]
  - Non-trampoline functions: locals[n] (local array)
- Added frozen functions test to cli build step (catches errors locally)

The root cause was mixing runtime is_trampoline checks with break
statements, which C rejects even though the condition is constant.
All checks now use compile-time branching in Zig codegen.

Fixes: Build now passes with zig build cli -Dsource-dir=bench
